name: cloud9-os
description: Cloud9 Operating System — air traffic control for 3PL, wrapping Helm WMS + Xero.

scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --include=dev --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
